title: The Inter-Services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023
full_text: The Inter-Services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023 अंतर-सेना संगठन (कमान, नियंत्रण और अनुशासन) अधिनियम, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2023-28 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 2023-08-15 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Inter-Services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023 Hindi Title: अंतर-सेना संगठन (कमान, नियंत्रण और अनुशासन) अधिनियम, 2023 Long Title: An Act to empower the Commander-in-Chief or the Officer-in-Command of Inter-services Organisations in respect of service personnel who are subject to the Air Force Act, 1950, the Army Act, 1950 and the Navy Act, 1957, who are serving under or attached to his command, for the maintenance of discipline and proper discharge of their duties, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 10-05-2023 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Inter-Services Organisations (Command, Control and Discipline) Act, 2023 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II SPECIAL PROVISION FOR CERTAIN FORCES CHAPTER III CONSTITUTION OF INTER-SERVICES ORGANISATION AND ITS OFFICERS CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Application of Act. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Special provision for certain forces under Central Government. Section 5. Constitution of Inter- services Organisation or Joint Services Command. Section 6. Existing Inter-services Organisations and Commander-in-Chief or Officer-in-Command to continue. Section 7. Powers of Commander- in-Chief or Officer-in-Command. Section 8. Commanding Officer. Section 9. Superintendence of Central Government. Section 10. Power to declare persons to be on active service. Section 11. Power to make rules. Section 12. Overriding effect of this Act. Section 13. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 14. Power to remove difficulties. Section 15. Laying of rules before Parliament.
